COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
